name: Browser History Search
description: Search your Chrome browser history directly from ULauncher—find visited websites, most visited pages, and more. Results are synced with your actual browser history, so you get the same sites you’d see when searching in the browser.

preferences.name: Cache file path
preferences.description: Where to store the history cache (JSON). Run the extension with 'load' to build it.

preferences.name: Blacklist
preferences.description: Domains or words to hide from results (one per line). Example: facebook.com, youtube.com

preferences.name: Max suggestions
preferences.description: Maximum number of sites to show (e.g. 12).

preferences.name: Keyword
preferences.description: Type this in ULauncher to search history.
